category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an AWS IAM security assessment tool; official repository describes least-privilege violation detection and risk-prioritized reports.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cloudsplaining; official Read the Docs and Salesforce GitHub repository use Cloudsplaining.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation; official GitHub README points to Read the Docs for full documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Salesforce GitHub repository is linked from the project documentation and identifies Cloudsplaining as the AWS IAM Security Assessment tool.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports AWS IAM security assessment tags; official repository describes least-privilege and policy-risk analysis.
